findings.description: Section s3 hints are missing PascalCase class names `Example2Form` and `Entity1`, both of which appear in the s3 code examples (Form and JSP implementation for variable-length arrays).
findings.source_evidence: Source section '可変配列長の Form 配列を入力する際の実装例' uses Example2Form constructor and Entity1[] array. s3 hints contain only: @ValidationTarget, sizeKey, @Digits, @Required, @PropertyName, 可変配列長, リクエストパラメータ 配列長, entityArraySize.

findings.description: The Action code in s2 faithfully reproduces a variable name bug from the source: `validateForSample.abortIfInvalid()` uses the method name as a variable, but the declared variable is `validationResult`. While this matches the source verbatim, it may mislead AI agents reading the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Source code block under 'Action の実装': `ValidationContext<Example2Form> validationResult = ValidationUtil.validateAndConvertRequest(...); validateForSample.abortIfInvalid();` — the second line should be `validationResult.abortIfInvalid()`.
